title: nassella ligularis
intro: Nassella ligularis, also known as needle and thread, is a type of grass native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Nassella ligularis include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Nassella ligularis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
